case_title: CMC TRAFFIC CONTROL SPECIALISTS VS. STATEWIDE CONCRETE PUMPING, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CMC TRAFFIC CONTROL SPECIALISTS AS TO DEFENDANT STATEWIDE CONCRETE PUMPING, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED MAR-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STATEWIDE CONCRETE PUMPING, INC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CMC TRAFFIC CONTROL SPECIALISTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CMC TRAFFIC CONTROL SPECIALISTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATEWIDE CONCRETE PUMPING, INC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY EVANS, TYRONE ANTHONY (OWNER) HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-22-2011 (SERVICE FEE $55.00). AS TO THIRD PARTY EVANS, TYRONE ANTHONY (OWNER)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CMC TRAFFIC CONTROL SPECIALISTS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2011 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-11-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT RPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2011; JUDGMENT DEBTOR STATEWIDE CONCRETE PUMPING, INC FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
